# Agent OS: High-Performance Vanilla JS — Index for AI Agents

Use this file to discover which skill to load. Each skill lives in a directory of the same name under `skills/` and contains `SKILL.md`.

**CRITICAL RULE:** Do NOT load any GSAP skills (`gsap-*`) unless the user EXPLICITLY asks to use GSAP or explicitly asks for an animation library. If the task is just regular DOM manipulation or business logic, IGNORE the GSAP skills.

## Core Architecture & Context Skills (Phase 0)

reverse-interrogation
  Skill: Kích hoạt `/crey`. Tạo thư mục `brainstorm/`. Phỏng vấn bóc tách ngữ cảnh trước khi code.
  Triggers: /crey, /grillmey, interview me, phỏng vấn, hỏi tôi, bắt đầu dự án mới.

ai-security
  Skill: Bảo vệ ứng dụng Front-End khỏi Prompt Injection và DOM XSS. Kỹ thuật Sandbox.
  Triggers: security, bảo mật, prompt injection, xss, đánh cắp token, iframe sandbox.

## Vanilla JS Skills (Phase 1)

dom-testing
  Skill: Hợp đồng DOM với `data-*` attributes, tự động hóa bằng Playwright, chống ngụy biện kiểm thử.
  Triggers: /test, dom contract, playwright, end-to-end test, data-cy, kiểm thử.

performance-loops
  Skill: Tối ưu hóa vòng lặp (60fps), `requestAnimationFrame`, Zero-allocation, Garbage Collection.
  Triggers: loop, vòng lặp, forEach, map, filter, rAF, 60fps, performance loop, memory leak.

data-structures
  Skill: Xử lý dữ liệu (String, Array, Object) đúng chuẩn O(1) hoặc O(log N).
  Triggers: string manipulation, regex, array performance, object reference, kiểu dữ liệu.

## Algorithms (Phase 2)

algorithms
  Skill: Kho thuật toán Front-End (Binary Search, BFS/DFS, FLIP, Sliding Window) và cẩm nang ánh xạ GSAP.
  Triggers: thuật toán, algorithm, binary search, bfs, dfs, flip animation, gsap algorithms, tối ưu hiệu năng.

## GSAP Skills (Phase 3 - LAZY LOAD)

> **WARNING:** ONLY load these if the user explicitly requests GSAP animations.

gsap-core
  Core API: gsap.to(), from(), fromTo(), easing, duration, stagger, autoAlpha, gsap.matchMedia().
  Triggers: gsap, gsap animation, gsap core, tweens, autoAlpha, matchMedia.

gsap-timeline
  Timelines: gsap.timeline(), position parameter, labels, nesting.
  Triggers: gsap timeline, sequencing, choreograph, animation order.

gsap-scrolltrigger
  ScrollTrigger: scroll-linked animations, pinning, scrub, triggers, refresh.
  Triggers: scrolltrigger, scroll animation, parallax, pin section.

gsap-plugins
  Plugins: Flip, Draggable, SplitText, Observer, CustomEase, v.v.
  Triggers: gsap plugin, flip, draggable, splittext, morphsvg, drawsvg.

gsap-utils
  gsap.utils: clamp, mapRange, normalize, interpolate, random, toArray, wrap.
  Triggers: gsap.utils, clamp, mapRange, gsap math.

gsap-performance
  Performance: transforms, will-change, batching, ScrollTrigger tips.
  Triggers: gsap performance, animation jank, 60fps gsap.
